hooks.command: input=$(cat); echo "$input" | jq -e -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE '(^|[^a-zA-Z])gh[[:space:]]+pr[[:space:]]+create([[:space:]]|$)' || exit 0; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check 1>&2 || { echo 'Pre-PR checks failed. Fix typecheck / lint / format before opening PR.' 1>&2; exit 2; }
hooks.statusMessage: Rodando typecheck + lint + format antes do gh pr create...

hooks.command: input=$(cat); echo "$input" | jq -e -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE '(^|[[:space:]])git[[:space:]]+commit' || exit 0; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACM | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx|json|md|css)$'); [ -z "$STAGED" ] && exit 0; echo "$STAGED" | tr '\n' '\0' | xargs -0 npx prettier --write 1>&2 && echo "$STAGED" | tr '\n' '\0' | xargs -0 git add 1>&2
hooks.statusMessage: Prettier nos arquivos staged antes do commit...

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|json|md|css)$' && npx prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null; } 2>/dev/null || true
